core_philosophy: Authority, Clarity, Truth. A high-performance command center for sales. Color is used strictly for function, 95% of UI is monochrome. Sharp edges, explicit borders, high data density.

components_override.button: font-['IBM_Plex_Sans'] font-medium rounded-none px-4 py-2 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] disabled:opacity-50 flex items-center gap-2
components_override.input: w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-none px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:border-[#002FA7] outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-gray-400
components_override.badge: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 border border-gray-200 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
components_override.table_header: bg-gray-50 border-y border-gray-200 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500

backgrounds.description: Use CSS grid pattern: background-image: linear-gradient(#e5e7eb 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, #e5e7eb 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 24px 24px; background-color: #FAFAFA; on the login wrapper to create an architectural, blueprint feel.

ui_specifics.login_page: Split layout. Left: Architect grid pattern (from background setting) with a massive, bold Chivo headline. Right: stark white login form card with heavy 1px border. No shadows.
ui_specifics.global_navigation: Top bar: White, 1px bottom border, sticky. Left sidebar for admin/exec navigation with a 1px right border, light gray bg (bg-gray-50), and simple bold text links (hover:bg-gray-200).
ui_specifics.lead_list: Use the table component overrides. Emphasize row state: Unread leads have font-bold. Overdue leads have a 2px left border in #E60000. 'Open Justdial Lead' should be an explicit outline button.
ui_specifics.lead_detail_drawer: Slide-in from right. High density. Split vertically: Top area for contact & status, Left column for timeline/notes, Right column for WhatsApp Conversation panel.
ui_specifics.whatsapp_panel: Distinct aesthetic. Dark slate (#0F172A) background to differentiate from CRM data. Chat bubbles in pure white and green (#008A00). Keep the UI looking 'technical', not consumer chat app.
ui_specifics.kanban_board: Columns separated by 1px solid #E5E7EB. Cards are minimal flat rectangles (no radius, no shadow, 1px border). Dragging lifts card with a sharp shadow.
ui_specifics.charts: Recharts. Line/Bar charts should use straight, linear lines (type='linear', not 'monotone'). Grid lines should be very faint (#F3F4F6). Primary chart color: #002FA7. Secondary: #E60000 for missed leads.
ui_specifics.empty_states: No cutesy vector art. Use Phosphor Icons (e.g., FileX, Inbox, Users) scaled to 64px with a 1px stroke weight (weight='light'), centered above a brief uppercase label.
ui_specifics.modals: Backdrop: pure black at 40% opacity (bg-black/40). Modal window: flat white rectangle, heavy 1px border, 0px radius. No shadow.

technical_instructions.css: Use Tailwind CSS. Adhere strictly to the color scale provided. Avoid using multiple generic grays; stick to the gray-50 to gray-900 scale.
technical_instructions.fonts: Add fonts directly to HTML head or CSS imports. Define font-families in tailwind config extending sans.
technical_instructions.components: You can use Shadcn, but MUST override all `rounded-md` and `shadow` classes to `rounded-none` and `shadow-none` to match the Swiss Brutalist aesthetic. Form elements must feel structural.
technical_instructions.icons: Install '@phosphor-icons/react'. Use weight='regular' for standard, weight='fill' for active states.
technical_instructions.testing: All key interactive components (buttons, links, form fields, cards) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based names (e.g., 'submit-login-btn', 'lead-status-select').
